hero.description: I'm a passionate software engineer specializing in building exceptional digital experiences. Currently focused on creating accessible, human-centered products using modern web technologies and AI.

about.description: I'm a Full Stack Developer with expertise in React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. I love solving complex problems and building scalable applications. With experience in AI/ML and DevOps, I bring a holistic approach to software development.
